# ClaimWatch

ClaimWatch is a US consumer recall, refund, settlement, and claim deadline tracker.

## Important URLs
- Home: https://simon622.shop/
- Latest JSON: https://simon622.shop/api/latest.json
- All items JSON: https://simon622.shop/api/items.json
- RSS feed: https://simon622.shop/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://simon622.shop/sitemap.xml
- Methodology: https://simon622.shop/methodology/
- Sources: https://simon622.shop/sources/
- Companies: https://simon622.shop/companies/
- Topics hub: https://simon622.shop/topics/

## Data Policy
Trend data is used for prioritization. Official source matching is required before an item is marked as verified. Monitoring pages are informational and should not be treated as official legal, medical, or financial advice.

## Current High-Priority Items
- FSIS Issues Public Health Alert for Various Meat and Poultry Products Containing FDA-Regulated Dairy Products That Have Been Recalled Due to Possible Salmonella Contamination: https://simon622.shop/item/fsis-fsis-issues-public-health-alert-for-various-meat-and-poultry-products-containing-fda-/
- Ethnic Foods Inc: Bombay Kitchen brand Tikka Sev; Net Wt 9oz (255g); Recall: https://simon622.shop/item/ethnic-foods-inc-bombay-kitchen-brand-tikka-sev-net-wt-9oz-255g/
- World Bright International Limited Recalls Agio Menlo Woven Patio Swings Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Fall Hazard; Sold at Costco: https://simon622.shop/item/cpsc-26485/
- Zarlengo Italian Ice: Zarlengo's Double Dark Chocolate Gelato packaged in 1 Gallon bucket/pail - white round food and freezer grade High-Density Polyethylene buck Recall: https://simon622.shop/item/zarlengo-italian-ice-zarlengo-s-double-dark-chocolate-gelato-packaged-in-1-gallon-bucket-p/
